content: I just joined. What's the safest place to start?
Welcome. Start with the docs and the FAQ, then ask in public if anything is still fuzzy. Slow and public is safer than fast and private.
Someone claiming to be support DM'd me a verification link. Legit?
That's a scam. Don't click it. Block them.
Can I DM newcomers a setup guide if I'm just trying to help?
You mean well, but don't do that. Unsolicited DMs look exactly like scams.
People are saying a feature is live. Where should I verify it before I repeat it?
Check the latest announcement first. If it isn't there, don't repeat it yet.
I've asked twice already. Is anyone actually paying attention?
That wait is frustrating. Repost the exact issue in one clean message and people can help.
An outside service says my account is unauthorized. Can you fix that from here?
That sounds like a third-party issue. We can sanity-check it, but the actual fix has to come from them.
